---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change to the pipeline, gates, or Studio
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What's missing or awkward today? What are you trying to do that the pipeline
doesn't currently support?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you'd like. If it touches a gate or checker, note
whether findings should be HARD or WARN and why (see the deterministic-gate
philosophy in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)).

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why you'd prefer this one.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, docs, or discussion.
